reference: I have a two-and-a-half-month-old baby. He cries a lot before passing stool. His stool color is reddish-brown, and he is passing mucus as well. I am not getting enough breast milk, so I have started giving him fresh cow's milk. I am concerned as he cries a lot. My doctor thinks he has amoebiasis.
text: I have a 2-and-a-half-month-old baby. He cries a lot before passing stool. His stool color is reddish-brown, and he is passing mucus as well. I am not getting enough breast milk, so I have started giving him fresh cow's milk. I am concerned as he cries a lot; my doctor thinks he has amoebiasis.
